 980→    private fun currentIndent() =
 981→        indentContextStack
 982→            .peekLast()
 983→            .indent()
 984→
 985→    private fun startIndentContext(
 986→        fromAstNode: ASTNode,
 987→        toAstNode: ASTNode = fromAstNode.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
 988→        nodeIndent: String = currentIndent(),
 989→        childIndent: String = indentConfig.indent,
 990→        firstChildIndent: String = childIndent,
 991→        lastChildIndent: String = childIndent,
 992→        activated: Boolean = false,
 993→    ): IndentContext =
 994→        IndentContext(
 995→            fromASTNode = fromAstNode,
 996→            toASTNode = toAstNode,
 997→            nodeIndent = nodeIndent,
 998→            firstChildIndent = firstChildIndent,
 999→            childIndent = childIndent,
1000→            lastChildIndent = lastChildIndent,
1001→            activated = activated,
1002→        ).also { newIndentContext ->
1003→            LOGGER.trace {
1004→                val nodeIndentLevel = indentConfig.indentLevelFrom(newIndentContext.nodeIndent)
1005→                val childIndentLevel = indentConfig.indentLevelFrom(newIndentContext.childIndent)
1006→                "Create new indent context (same as parent) with level ($nodeIndentLevel, $childIndentLevel) for " +
1007→                    "${fromAstNode.elementType}: ${newIndentContext.nodes}"
1008→            }
1009→            indentContextStack.addLast(newIndentContext)
1010→        }
1011→
1012→    override fun afterVisitChildNodes(
1013→        node: ASTNode,
1014→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
1015→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
1016→    ) {
1017→        while (indentContextStack.peekLast()?.toASTNode == node) {
1018→            LOGGER.trace {
1019→                val indentContext = indentContextStack.peekLast()
1020→                val nodeIndentLevel = indentConfig.indentLevelFrom(indentContext.nodeIndent)
1021→                val childIndentLevel = indentConfig.indentLevelFrom(indentContext.childIndent)
1022→                "Remove indent context with level ($nodeIndentLevel, $childIndentLevel) for ${indentContext.fromASTNode.elementType}: " +
1023→                    "${indentContext.nodes}"
1024→            }
1025→            indentContextStack
1026→                .removeLast()
1027→                .also {
1028→                    LOGGER.trace {
1029→                        val indentContext = indentContextStack.peekLast()
1030→                        val nodeIndentLevel = indentConfig.indentLevelFrom(indentContext.nodeIndent)
1031→                        val childIndentLevel = indentConfig.indentLevelFrom(indentContext.childIndent)
1032→                        "Last indent context with level ($nodeIndentLevel, $childIndentLevel) for " +
1033→                            "${indentContext.fromASTNode.elementType}: ${indentContext.nodes}"
1034→                    }
1035→                }
1036→        }
1037→    }
1038→
1039→    override fun afterLastNode() {
1040→        require(indentContextStack.isEmpty()) {
1041→            indentContextStack
1042→                .joinToString(prefix = "Stack should be empty:\n\t", separator = "\n\t") { it.toString() }
1043→        }
1044→    }
1045→
1046→    private fun visitNewLineIndentation(
1047→        node: ASTNode,
1048→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
1049→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
1050→    ) {
1051→        if (node.ignoreIndent()) {
1052→            return
1053→        }
1054→
1055→        val normalizedNodeIndent = node.normalizedIndent(emit)
1056→        val expectedIndentation = node.expectedIndent()
1057→        val text = node.text
1058→        val nodeIndent = text.substringAfterLast("\n")
1059→        if (nodeIndent != normalizedNodeIndent || normalizedNodeIndent != expectedIndentation) {
1060→            if (normalizedNodeIndent != expectedIndentation) {
1061→                emit(
1062→                    node.startOffset + text.length - nodeIndent.length,
1063→                    "Unexpected indentation (${normalizedNodeIndent.length}) (should be ${expectedIndentation.length})",
1064→                    true,
1065→                )
1066→            } else {
1067→                // Indentation was at correct level but contained invalid indent characters. This violation has already
1068→                // been emitted.
1069→            }
1070→            LOGGER.trace {
1071→                "Line $line: " + (if (!autoCorrect) "would have " else "") + "changed indentation to ${expectedIndentation.length} " +
1072→                    "(from ${normalizedNodeIndent.length}) for ${node.elementType}: ${node.textWithEscapedTabAndNewline()}"
1073→            }
1074→            if (autoCorrect) {
1075→                (node as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(
1076→                    text.substringBeforeLast("\n") + "\n" + expectedIndentation,
1077→                )
1078→            }
1079→        } else {
1080→            node.processedButNoIndentationChangedNeeded()
1081→        }
1082→    }
1083→
1084→    private fun ASTNode.ignoreIndent(): Boolean {
1085→        val nextLeaf = nextLeaf()
1086→        if (text.endsWith("\n") && nextLeaf.isStartOfRawStringLiteral()) {
1087→            processedButNoIndentationChangedNeeded()
1088→            return true // raw strings (""") are allowed at column 0
1089→        }
1090→
1091→        nextLeaf
1092→            ?.parent(strict = false) { it.psi is PsiComment }
1093→            ?.let { comment ->
1094→                if (text.endsWith("\n")) {
1095→                    processedButNoIndentationChangedNeeded()
1096→                    return true // comments are allowed at column 0
1097→                }
1098→                if (comment.textContains('\n') && comment.elementType == BLOCK_COMMENT) {
1099→                    // FIXME: while we cannot assume any kind of layout inside a block comment,
1100→                    // `/*` and `*/` can still be indented
1101→                    processedButNoIndentationChangedNeeded()
1102→                    return true
1103→                }
1104→            }
1105→        return false
1106→    }
1107→
1108→    private fun ASTNode?.isStartOfRawStringLiteral(): Boolean = this != null && this.elementType == OPEN_QUOTE && this.text == "\"\"\""
1109→
1110→    private fun ASTNode.processedButNoIndentationChangedNeeded() =
1111→        LOGGER.trace { "No indentation change required for $elementType: ${textWithEscapedTabAndNewline()}" }
1112→
1113→    private fun ASTNode.expectedIndent(): String {
1114→        val lastIndexContext = indentContextStack.peekLast()
1115→        val nextLeaf = nextLeaf()
1116→        val adjustedChildIndent =
1117→            when {
1118→                this == lastIndexContext.fromASTNode.firstChildLeafOrSelf() ||
1119→                    nextLeaf == lastIndexContext.fromASTNode.firstChildLeafOrSelf() ->
1120→                    lastIndexContext.firstChildIndent
1121→
1122→                this == lastIndexContext.toASTNode ||
1123→                    nextLeaf == lastIndexContext.toASTNode ->
1124→                    lastIndexContext.lastChildIndent
1125→
1126→                else -> lastIndexContext.childIndent
1127→            }
1128→        return lastIndexContext.nodeIndent + adjustedChildIndent
1129→    }
1130→
1131→    private fun ASTNode.normalizedIndent(emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit): String {
1132→        val nodeIndent = text.substringAfterLast("\n")
1133→        return when (indentConfig.indentStyle) {
1134→            SPACE -> {
1135→                if ('\t' in nodeIndent) {
1136→                    emit(
1137→                        startOffset + text.length - nodeIndent.length,
1138→                        "Unexpected tab character(s)",
1139→                        true,
1140→                    )
1141→                    indentConfig.toNormalizedIndent(nodeIndent)
1142→                } else {
1143→                    nodeIndent
1144→                }
1145→            }
1146→
1147→            TAB -> {
1148→                val acceptableTrailingSpaces = acceptableTrailingSpaces()
1149→                val nodeIndentWithoutAcceptableTrailingSpaces = nodeIndent.removeSuffix(acceptableTrailingSpaces)
1150→                if (' ' in nodeIndentWithoutAcceptableTrailingSpaces) {
1151→                    emit(
1152→                        startOffset + text.length - nodeIndent.length,
1153→                        "Unexpected space character(s)",
1154→                        true,
1155→                    )
1156→                    indentConfig
1157→                        .toNormalizedIndent(nodeIndentWithoutAcceptableTrailingSpaces)
1158→                        .plus(acceptableTrailingSpaces)
1159→                } else {
1160→                    nodeIndent
1161→                }
1162→            }
1163→        }
1164→    }
1165→
1166→    private fun visitWhiteSpaceBeforeClosingQuote(
1167→        node: ASTNode,
1168→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
1169→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
1170→    ) {
1171→        if (!this::stringTemplateIndenter.isInitialized) {
1172→            stringTemplateIndenter = StringTemplateIndenter(codeStyle, indentConfig)
1173→        }
1174→        stringTemplateIndenter.visitClosingQuotes(currentIndent(), node.treeParent, autoCorrect, emit)
1175→    }
1176→
1177→    private fun ASTNode?.isElvisOperator() =
1178→        this != null &&
1179→            elementType == OPERATION_REFERENCE &&
1180→            firstChildNode?.elementType == ELVIS
1181→
1182→    private fun ASTNode.acceptableTrailingSpaces(): String {
1183→        require(elementType == WHITE_SPACE)
1184→        val acceptableTrailingSpaces =
1185→            when (nextLeaf()?.elementType) {
1186→                KDOC_LEADING_ASTERISK, KDOC_END -> {
1187→                    // The indentation of a KDoc comment contains a space as the last character regardless of the indentation
1188→                    // style (tabs or spaces) except for the starting line of the KDoc comment
1189→                    KDOC_CONTINUATION_INDENT
1190→                }
1191→
1192→                TYPE_CONSTRAINT -> {
1193→                    // 6 spaces (length of "where" keyword plus a separator space) to indent type constraints as below:
1194→                    //    where A1 : RecyclerView.Adapter<V1>,
1195→                    //               A1 : ComposableAdapter.ViewTypeProvider,
1196→                    TYPE_CONSTRAINT_CONTINUATION_INDENT
1197→                }
1198→
1199→                else -> ""
1200→            }
1201→        val nodeIndent = text.substringAfterLast("\n")
1202→        return if (nodeIndent.endsWith(acceptableTrailingSpaces)) {
1203→            return acceptableTrailingSpaces
1204→        } else {
1205→            ""
1206→        }
1207→    }
1208→
1209→    private fun startNoIndentZone(node: ASTNode) =
1210→        IndentContext(
1211→            fromASTNode = node,
1212→            nodeIndent = "",
1213→            firstChildIndent = "",
1214→            childIndent = "",
1215→            lastChildIndent = "",
1216→            activated = true,
1217→        )
1218→
1219→    private companion object {
1220→        const val KDOC_CONTINUATION_INDENT = " "
1221→        const val TYPE_CONSTRAINT_CONTINUATION_INDENT = "      " // Length of keyword "where" plus separating space
1222→        val CHAINABLE_EXPRESSION = setOf(DOT_QUALIFIED_EXPRESSION, SAFE_ACCESS_EXPRESSION)
1223→    }
1224→
1225→    private data class IndentContext(
1226→        /**
1227→         * The node on which the indent context starts.
1228→         */
1229→        val fromASTNode: ASTNode,
1230→        /**
1231→         * The node at which the indent context ends. If null, then the context ends at the last child leaf of the node
1232→         * on which the indent context starts.
1233→         */
1234→        val toASTNode: ASTNode = fromASTNode.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
1235→        /**
1236→         * Cumulative indentation for the node. Normally this should be equal to a multiple of the
1237→         * 'indentConfig.indentStyle' to ensure a consistent indentation style.
1238→         */
1239→        val nodeIndent: String,
1240→        /**
1241→         * Additional indentation for first child node. Normally this should be equal to the 'indentConfig.indent' to
1242→         * ensure a consistent indentation style. In very limited cases when the default indentation is set to 'tab' it
1243→         * is still needed to adjust the last indentation using spaces.
1244→         */
1245→        val firstChildIndent: String,
1246→        /**
1247→         * Additional indentation for child nodes. Normally this should be equal to the 'indentConfig.indent' to ensure
1248→         * a consistent indentation style. In very limited cases when the default indentation is set to 'tab' it is
1249→         * still needed to adjust the last indentation using spaces.
1250→         */
1251→        val childIndent: String,
1252→        /**
1253→         * Additional indentation for last child node. Normally this should be equal to the 'indentConfig.indent' to
1254→         * ensure a consistent indentation style. In very limited cases when the default indentation is set to 'tab' it
1255→         * is still needed to adjust the last indentation using spaces.
1256→         */
1257→        val lastChildIndent: String,
1258→        /**
1259→         * True when the indentation level of this context is activated
1260→         */
1261→        val activated: Boolean = false,
1262→    ) {
1263→        val nodes: String
1264→            get() =
1265→                fromASTNode
1266→                    .prevLeaf() // The 'fromAstNode' itself needs to be returned by '.leaves()' call as well
1267→                    ?.leaves()
1268→                    .orEmpty()
1269→                    .takeWhile {
1270→                        // The 'toAstNode' itself needs to be included as well
1271→                        it != toASTNode.nextLeaf()
1272→                    }
1273→                    .joinToString(separator = "") { it.text }
1274→                    .textWithEscapedTabAndNewline()
1275→
1276→        fun indent() =
1277→            if (activated) {
1278→                nodeIndent + childIndent
1279→            } else {
1280→                nodeIndent
1281→            }
1282→
1283→        fun prevCodeLeaf() = fromASTNode.prevCodeLeaf()!!
1284→    }
1285→}
1286→
1287→private fun ASTNode.textWithEscapedTabAndNewline() = text.textWithEscapedTabAndNewline()
1288→
1289→private fun String.textWithEscapedTabAndNewline(): String {
1290→    val (prefix, suffix) =
1291→        if (this.all { it.isWhitespace() }) {
1292→            Pair("[", "]")
1293→        } else {
1294→            Pair("", "")
1295→        }
1296→    return prefix
1297→        .plus(
1298→            this
1299→                .replace("\t", "\\t")
1300→                .replace("\n", "\\n"),
1301→        ).plus(suffix)
1302→}
1303→
1304→private class StringTemplateIndenter(
1305→    private val codeStyle: CodeStyleValue,
1306→    private val indentConfig: IndentConfig,
1307→) {
1308→    fun visitClosingQuotes(
1309→        expectedIndent: String,
1310→        node: ASTNode,
1311→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
1312→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
1313→    ) {
1314→        require(node.elementType == STRING_TEMPLATE)
1315→        node
1316→            .let { it.psi as KtStringTemplateExpression }
1317→            .takeIf { it.isFollowedByTrimIndent() || it.isFollowedByTrimMargin() }
1318→            ?.takeIf { it.isMultiLine() }
1319→            ?.let { _ ->
1320→                if (node.containsMixedIndentationCharacters()) {
1321→                    // It can not be determined with certainty how mixed indentation characters should be interpreted.
1322→                    // The trimIndent function handles tabs and spaces equally (one tabs equals one space) while the user
1323→                    // might expect that the tab size in the indentation is more than one space.
1324→                    emit(
1325→                        node.startOffset,
1326→                        "Indentation of multiline string should not contain both tab(s) and space(s)",
1327→                        false,
1328→                    )
1329→                    return
1330→                }
1331→
1332→                val prefixLength = node.getCommonPrefixLength()
1333→                val prevLeaf = node.prevLeaf()
1334→                val correctedExpectedIndent =
1335→                    if (codeStyle == ktlint_official && node.isRawStringLiteralReturnInFunctionBodyBlock()) {

 90→/**
 91→ * This rule inserts missing newlines (e.g. between parentheses of a multi-line function call). This logic previously
 92→ * was part of the IndentationRule (phase 1).
 93→ *
 94→ * Whenever a linebreak is inserted, this rules assumes that the parent node it indented correctly. So the indentation
 95→ * is fixed with respect to indentation of the parent. This is just a simple best effort for the case that the
 96→ * indentation rule is not run.
 97→ */
 98→public class WrappingRule :
 99→    StandardRule(
100→        id = "wrapping",
101→        usesEditorConfigProperties =
102→            setOf(
103→                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
104→                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
105→                MAX_LINE_LENGTH_PROPERTY,
106→            ),
107→        visitorModifiers =
108→            setOf(
109→                RunAfterRule(
110→                    ruleId = ANNOTATION_RULE_ID,
111→                    mode = REGARDLESS_WHETHER_RUN_AFTER_RULE_IS_LOADED_OR_DISABLED,
112→                ),
113→            ),
114→    ) {
115→    private var line = 1
116→    private var indentConfig = DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
117→    private var maxLineLength: Int = MAX_LINE_LENGTH_PROPERTY.defaultValue
118→
119→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
120→        line = 1
121→        indentConfig =
122→            IndentConfig(
123→                indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
124→                tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
125→            )
126→        maxLineLength = editorConfig[MAX_LINE_LENGTH_PROPERTY]
127→    }
128→
129→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
130→        node: ASTNode,
131→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
132→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
133→    ) {
134→        when (node.elementType) {
135→            BLOCK -> beforeVisitBlock(node, autoCorrect, emit)
136→            LPAR, LBRACKET -> rearrangeBlock(node, autoCorrect, emit)
137→            SUPER_TYPE_LIST -> rearrangeSuperTypeList(node, autoCorrect, emit)
138→            VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST, VALUE_ARGUMENT_LIST -> rearrangeValueList(node, autoCorrect, emit)
139→            TYPE_ARGUMENT_LIST, TYPE_PARAMETER_LIST -> rearrangeTypeArgumentList(node, autoCorrect, emit)
140→            ARROW -> rearrangeArrow(node, autoCorrect, emit)
141→            WHITE_SPACE -> line += node.text.count { it == '\n' }
142→            CLOSING_QUOTE -> rearrangeClosingQuote(node, autoCorrect, emit)
143→            SEMICOLON -> insertNewLineAfterSemi(node, autoCorrect, emit)
144→        }
145→    }
146→
147→    private fun beforeVisitBlock(
148→        node: ASTNode,
149→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
150→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
151→    ) {
152→        require(node.elementType == BLOCK)
153→
154→        val lbrace =
155→            node
156→                .getStartOfBlock()
157→                ?.takeIf { it.elementType == LBRACE }
158→                ?: return
159→        if (lbrace.followedByNewline() ||
160→            lbrace.followedByEolComment() ||
161→            lbrace.isPartOf(LONG_STRING_TEMPLATE_ENTRY)
162→        ) {
163→            // String template inside raw string literal may exceed the maximum line length
164→            return
165→        }
166→
167→        node
168→            .takeUnless { it.firstChildLeafOrSelf().elementType == EOL_COMMENT }
169→            ?.getEndOfBlock()
170→            ?.takeIf { it.elementType == RBRACE }
171→            ?.let { rbrace ->
172→                if (hasNewLineInClosedRange(lbrace, rbrace)) {
173→                    requireNewlineAfterLeaf(lbrace, autoCorrect, emit)
174→                }
175→            }
176→
177→        if (maxLineLength != MAX_LINE_LENGTH_PROPERTY_OFF) {
178→            val lengthUntilBeginOfLine =
179→                node
180→                    .leaves(false)
181→                    .takeWhile { !it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
182→                    .sumOf { it.textLength }
183→            val lengthUntilEndOfLine =
184→                node
185→                    .firstChildLeafOrSelf()
186→                    .leavesIncludingSelf()
187→                    .takeWhile { !it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
188→                    .sumOf { it.textLength }
189→            if (lengthUntilBeginOfLine + lengthUntilEndOfLine > maxLineLength) {
190→                requireNewlineAfterLeaf(lbrace, autoCorrect, emit)
191→            }
192→        }
193→    }
194→
195→    private fun ASTNode.followedByEolComment() =
196→        null !=
197→            leaves()
198→                .takeWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() || it.elementType == EOL_COMMENT }
199→                .firstOrNull { it.elementType == EOL_COMMENT }
200→
201→    private fun rearrangeBlock(
202→        node: ASTNode,
203→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
204→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
205→    ) {
206→        val rElementType = MATCHING_RTOKEN_MAP[node.elementType]
207→        var newlineInBetween = false
208→        var parameterListInBetween = false
209→        var numberOfArgs = 0
210→        var firstArg: ASTNode? = null
211→        // matching ), ] or }
212→        val r = node.nextSibling {
213→            val isValueArgument = it.elementType == VALUE_ARGUMENT
214→            val hasLineBreak = if (isValueArgument) it.hasLineBreak(LAMBDA_EXPRESSION, FUN) else it.hasLineBreak()
215→            newlineInBetween = newlineInBetween || hasLineBreak
216→            parameterListInBetween = parameterListInBetween || it.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST
217→            if (isValueArgument) {
218→                numberOfArgs++
219→                firstArg = it
220→            }
221→            it.elementType == rElementType
222→        }!!
223→        if (
224→            !newlineInBetween ||
225→            // keep { p ->
226→            // }
227→            (node.elementType == LBRACE && parameterListInBetween) ||
228→            // keep ({
229→            // }) and (object : C {
230→            // })
231→            (
232→                numberOfArgs == 1 &&
233→                    firstArg?.firstChildNode?.elementType
234→                        ?.let { it == OBJECT_LITERAL || it == LAMBDA_EXPRESSION } == true
235→                )
236→        ) {
237→            return
238→        }
239→        if (node.isPartOfForLoopConditionWithMultilineExpression()) {
240→            // keep:
241→            // for (foo in listOf(
242→            //     "foo-1",
243→            //     "foo-2"
244→            // )) { ... }
245→            // but reject:
246→            // for (
247→            //     foo in listOf(
248→            //         "foo-1",
249→            //         "foo-2"
250→            //     )
251→            // ) { ... }
252→            return
253→        }
254→        if (!node.nextCodeLeaf()?.prevLeaf {
255→                // Skip comments, whitespace, and empty nodes
256→                !it.isPartOfComment() &&
257→                    !it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() &&
258→                    it.textLength > 0
259→            }.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() &&
260→            // IDEA quirk:
261→            // if (true &&
262→            //     true
263→            // ) {
264→            // }
265→            // instead of
266→            // if (
267→            //     true &&
268→            //     true
269→            // ) {
270→            // }
271→            node.treeNext?.elementType != CONDITION
272→        ) {
273→            requireNewlineAfterLeaf(node, autoCorrect, emit)
274→        }
275→        if (!r.prevLeaf().isWhiteSpaceWithNewline()) {
276→            requireNewlineBeforeLeaf(r, autoCorrect, emit, indentConfig.parentIndentOf(node))
277→        }
278→    }
279→
280→    private fun rearrangeSuperTypeList(
281→        node: ASTNode,
282→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
283→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
284→    ) {
285→        val entries = (node.psi as KtSuperTypeList).entries
286→        if (
287→            node.textContains('\n') &&
288→            entries.size > 1 &&
289→            // e.g.
290→            //
291→            // class A : B, C,
292→            //     D
293→            // or
294→            // class A : B, C({
295→            // }), D
296→            //
297→            // but not
298→            //
299→            // class A : B, C, D({
300→            // })
301→            !(
302→                entries.dropLast(1).all { it.elementType == SUPER_TYPE_ENTRY } &&
303→                    entries.last().elementType == SUPER_TYPE_CALL_ENTRY
304→                )
305→        ) {
306→            // put space after :
307→            if (!node.prevLeaf().isWhiteSpaceWithNewline()) {
308→                val colon = node.prevCodeLeaf()!!
309→                if (
310→                    !colon.prevLeaf().isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() &&
311→                    colon.prevCodeLeaf().let { it?.elementType != RPAR || !it.prevLeaf().isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
312→                ) {
313→                    requireNewlineAfterLeaf(colon, autoCorrect, emit)
314→                }
315→            }
316→            // put entries on separate lines
317→            for (c in node.children()) {
318→                if (c.elementType == COMMA &&
319→                    !c.treeNext.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() &&
320→                    !c.isFollowedByCommentOnSameLine()
321→                ) {
322→                    requireNewlineAfterLeaf(
323→                        nodeAfterWhichNewlineIsRequired = c,
324→                        autoCorrect = autoCorrect,
325→                        emit = emit,
326→                        indent = node.indent(),
327→                    )
328→                }
329→            }
330→        }
331→    }
332→
333→    private fun ASTNode.isFollowedByCommentOnSameLine() =
334→        nextLeaf { !it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() }
335→            ?.isPartOfComment() == true
336→
337→    private fun rearrangeValueList(
338→        node: ASTNode,
339→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
340→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
341→    ) {
342→        for (c in node.children()) {
343→            val hasLineBreak =
344→                when (c.elementType) {
345→                    VALUE_ARGUMENT -> c.hasLineBreak(LAMBDA_EXPRESSION, FUN)
346→                    VALUE_PARAMETER, ANNOTATION -> c.hasLineBreak()
347→                    else -> false
348→                }
349→            if (hasLineBreak) {
350→                // rearrange
351→                //
352→                // a, b, value(
353→                // ), c, d
354→                //
355→                // to
356→                //
357→                // a, b,
358→                // value(
359→                // ),
360→                // c, d
361→
362→                // insert \n in front of multi-line value
363→                val prevSibling = c.prevSibling { it.elementType != WHITE_SPACE }
364→                if (
365→                    prevSibling?.elementType == COMMA &&
366→                    !prevSibling.treeNext.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline()
367→                ) {
368→                    requireNewlineAfterLeaf(prevSibling, autoCorrect, emit)
369→                }
370→                // insert \n after multi-line value
371→                val nextSibling = c.nextSibling { it.elementType != WHITE_SPACE }
372→                val hasDestructuringDeclarationAsLastValueParameter =
373→                    c.isLastValueParameter() && c.firstChildNode.elementType == DESTRUCTURING_DECLARATION
374→                if (
375→                    nextSibling?.elementType == COMMA &&
376→                    !hasDestructuringDeclarationAsLastValueParameter &&
377→                    !nextSibling.treeNext.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() &&
378→                    // value(
379→                    // ), // a comment
380→                    // c, d
381→                    nextSibling.treeNext?.treeNext?.psi !is PsiComment
382→                ) {
383→                    requireNewlineAfterLeaf(nextSibling, autoCorrect, emit)
384→                }
385→            }
386→        }
387→    }
388→
389→    private fun ASTNode.isLastValueParameter() =
390→        elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER &&
391→            siblings().none { it.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER }
392→
393→    private fun rearrangeTypeArgumentList(
394→        node: ASTNode,
395→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
396→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
397→    ) {
398→        if (node.textContains('\n')) {
399→            // Each type projection must be preceded with a whitespace containing a newline
400→            node
401→                .children()
402→                .filter { it.elementType == TYPE_PROJECTION || it.elementType == TYPE_PARAMETER }
403→                .forEach { typeProjection ->
404→                    typeProjection
405→                        .prevSibling { !it.isPartOfComment() }
406→                        .let { prevSibling ->
407→                            if (prevSibling?.elementType == LT || prevSibling.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline()) {
408→                                emit(typeProjection.startOffset, "A newline was expected before '${typeProjection.text}'", true)
409→                                if (autoCorrect) {
410→                                    typeProjection.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(indentConfig.siblingIndentOf(node))
411→                                }
412→                            }
413→                        }
414→                }
415→
416→            // After the last type projection a whitespace containing a newline must exist
417→            node
418→                .findChildByType(GT)
419→                ?.let { closingAngle ->
420→                    val prevSibling = closingAngle.prevSibling { !it.isPartOfComment() }
421→                    if (prevSibling?.elementType != WHITE_SPACE || prevSibling.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline()) {
422→                        emit(closingAngle.startOffset, "A newline was expected before '${closingAngle.text}'", true)
423→                        if (autoCorrect) {
424→                            closingAngle.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(indentConfig.siblingIndentOf(node))
425→                        }
426→                    }
427→                }
428→
429→            Unit
430→        }
431→    }
432→
433→    private fun rearrangeClosingQuote(
434→        node: ASTNode,
435→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
436→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
437→    ) {
438→        node
439→            .treeParent
440→            .takeIf { it.elementType == STRING_TEMPLATE }
441→            ?.let { it.psi as KtStringTemplateExpression }
442→            ?.takeIf { it.isMultiLine() }
443→            ?.takeIf { it.isFollowedByTrimIndent() || it.isFollowedByTrimMargin() }
444→            ?.takeIf { node.treePrev.text.isNotBlank() }
445→            ?.let {
446→                // rewriting
447→                // """
448→                //     text
449→                // _""".trimIndent()
450→                // to
451→                // """
452→                //     text
453→                // _
454→                // """.trimIndent()
455→                emit(
456→                    node.startOffset,
457→                    "Missing newline before \"\"\"",
458→                    true,
459→                )
460→                if (autoCorrect) {
461→                    node as LeafPsiElement
462→                    node.rawInsertBeforeMe(LeafPsiElement(LITERAL_STRING_TEMPLATE_ENTRY, "\n"))
463→                }
464→                LOGGER.trace { "$line: " + (if (!autoCorrect) "would have " else "") + "inserted newline before (closing) \"\"\"" }
465→            }
466→    }

468→    private fun mustBeFollowedByNewline(node: ASTNode): Boolean {
469→        // find EOL token (last token before \n)
470→        // if token is in lTokenSet
471→        //     find matching rToken
472→        //     return true if there is no newline after the rToken
473→        // return false
474→        val nextCodeSibling = node.nextCodeSibling() // e.g. BINARY_EXPRESSION
475→        var lToken = nextCodeSibling?.nextLeaf { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }?.prevCodeLeaf()
476→        if (lToken != null && lToken.elementType !in LTOKEN_SET) {
477→            // special cases:
478→            // x = y.f({ z ->
479→            // })
480→            // x = y.f(0, 1,
481→            // 2, 3)
482→            lToken = lToken.prevLeaf { it.elementType in LTOKEN_SET || it == node }
483→        }
484→        if (lToken != null && lToken.elementType in LTOKEN_SET) {
485→            val rElementType = MATCHING_RTOKEN_MAP[lToken.elementType]
486→            val rToken = lToken.nextSibling { it.elementType == rElementType }
487→            return rToken?.treeParent == lToken.treeParent
488→        }
489→        if (nextCodeSibling?.textContains('\n') == false) {
490→            return true
491→        }
492→        return false
493→    }

495→    private fun rearrangeArrow(
496→        node: ASTNode,
497→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
498→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
499→    ) {
500→        val p = node.treeParent
501→        if (
502→            // check
503→            // `{ p -> ... }`
504→            // and
505→            // `when { m -> ... }`
506→            // only
507→            p.elementType.let { it != FUNCTION_LITERAL && it != WHEN_ENTRY } ||
508→            // ... and only if expression after -> spans multiple lines
509→            !p.textContains('\n') ||
510→            // permit
511→            // when {
512→            //     m -> 0 + d({
513→            //     })
514→            // }
515→            (p.elementType == WHEN_ENTRY && mustBeFollowedByNewline(node)) ||
516→            // permit
517→            // when (this) {
518→            //     in 0x1F600..0x1F64F, // Emoticons
519→            //     0x200D // Zero-width Joiner
520→            //     -> true
521→            // }
522→            (p.elementType == WHEN_ENTRY && node.prevLeaf()?.textContains('\n') == true)
523→        ) {
524→            return
525→        }
526→        if (!node.nextCodeLeaf()?.prevLeaf().isWhiteSpaceWithNewline()) {
527→            requireNewlineAfterLeaf(node, autoCorrect, emit)
528→        }
529→        val r = node.nextSibling { it.elementType == RBRACE } ?: return
530→        if (!r.prevLeaf().isWhiteSpaceWithNewline()) {
531→            requireNewlineBeforeLeaf(r, autoCorrect, emit, node.indent())
532→        }
533→    }

535→    private fun insertNewLineAfterSemi(
536→        node: ASTNode,
537→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
538→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
539→    ) {
540→        val previousCodeLeaf = node.prevCodeLeaf()?.lastChildLeafOrSelf() ?: return
541→        val nextCodeLeaf = node.nextCodeLeaf()?.firstChildLeafOrSelf() ?: return
542→        if (previousCodeLeaf.treeParent.elementType == ENUM_ENTRY && nextCodeLeaf.elementType == RBRACE) {
543→            // Allow
544→            // enum class INDEX2 { ONE, TWO, THREE; }
545→            return
546→        }
547→        if (noNewLineInClosedRange(previousCodeLeaf, nextCodeLeaf)) {
548→            requireNewlineAfterLeaf(node, autoCorrect, emit, previousCodeLeaf.indent())
549→            node
550→                .treeParent
551→                .takeIf { it.elementType == BLOCK }
552→                ?.let { block ->
553→                    beforeVisitBlock(block, autoCorrect, emit)
554→                    block
555→                        .treeParent
556→                        .takeIf { it.elementType == FUNCTION_LITERAL }
557→                        ?.findChildByType(ARROW)
558→                        ?.let { arrow -> rearrangeArrow(arrow, autoCorrect, emit) }
559→                }
560→        }
561→    }

563→    private fun requireNewlineBeforeLeaf(
564→        node: ASTNode,
565→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
566→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
567→        indent: String,
568→    ) {
569→        emit(
570→            node.startOffset - 1,
571→            """Missing newline before "${node.text}"""",
572→            true,
573→        )
574→        LOGGER.trace { "$line: " + ((if (!autoCorrect) "would have " else "") + "inserted newline before ${node.text}") }
575→        if (autoCorrect) {
576→            node.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(indent)
577→        }
578→    }
579→
580→    private fun requireNewlineAfterLeaf(
581→        nodeAfterWhichNewlineIsRequired: ASTNode,
582→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
583→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
584→        indent: String? = null,
585→        nodeToFix: ASTNode = nodeAfterWhichNewlineIsRequired,
586→    ) {
587→        emit(
588→            nodeAfterWhichNewlineIsRequired.startOffset + 1,
589→            """Missing newline after "${nodeAfterWhichNewlineIsRequired.text}"""",
590→            true,
591→        )
592→        LOGGER.trace {
593→            "$line: " + (if (!autoCorrect) "would have " else "") + "inserted newline after ${nodeAfterWhichNewlineIsRequired.text}"
594→        }
595→        if (autoCorrect) {
596→            val tempIndent = indent ?: (indentConfig.childIndentOf(nodeToFix))
597→            nodeToFix.upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(tempIndent)
598→        }
599→    }

601→    private fun KtStringTemplateExpression.isMultiLine(): Boolean {
602→        for (child in node.children()) {
603→            if (child.elementType == LITERAL_STRING_TEMPLATE_ENTRY) {
604→                val v = child.text
605→                if (v == "\n") {
606→                    return true
607→                }
608→            }
609→        }
610→        return false
611→    }

613→    private fun ASTNode.hasLineBreak(vararg ignoreElementTypes: IElementType): Boolean {
614→        if (isWhiteSpaceWithNewline()) return true
615→        return if (ignoreElementTypes.isEmpty()) {
616→            textContains('\n')
617→        } else {
618→            elementType !in ignoreElementTypes &&
619→                children().any { c -> c.textContains('\n') && c.elementType !in ignoreElementTypes }
620→        }
621→    }

623→    private fun KtStringTemplateExpression.isFollowedByTrimIndent() = isFollowedBy("trimIndent()")

627→    private fun KtStringTemplateExpression.isFollowedBy(callExpressionName: String) =
628→        this.node.nextSibling { it.elementType != DOT }
629→            .let { it?.elementType == CALL_EXPRESSION && it.text == callExpressionName }

631→    /**
632→     *  Allow for-statement in which only the expression contains a newline:
633→     *     for (foo in listOf(
634→     *         "foo-1",
635→     *         "foo-2"
636→     *     )) { ... }
637→     * but reject:
638→     *     for (
639→     *         foo in listOf(
640→     *             "foo-1",
641→     *             "foo-2"
642→     *         )
643→     *     ) { ... }
644→     */
645→    private fun ASTNode.isPartOfForLoopConditionWithMultilineExpression(): Boolean {
646→        if (treeParent.elementType != ElementType.FOR) {
647→            return false
648→        }
649→        if (this.elementType != LPAR) {
650→            return treeParent.findChildByType(LPAR)!!.isPartOfForLoopConditionWithMultilineExpression()
651→        }
652→        require(elementType == LPAR) {
653→            "Node should be the LPAR of the FOR loop"
654→        }
655→
656→        var node: ASTNode? = this
657→        while (node != null && node.elementType != RPAR) {
658→            if (node.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline()) {
659→                return false
660→            }
661→            node = node.nextSibling()
662→        }
663→        return true
664→    }

666→    override fun afterVisitChildNodes(
667→        node: ASTNode,
668→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
669→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
670→    ) {
671→        if (node.elementType == BLOCK) {
672→            val lbrace =
673→                node
674→                    .getStartOfBlock()
675→                    ?.takeIf { it.elementType == LBRACE }
676→                    ?: return
677→            node
678→                .getEndOfBlock()
679→                ?.takeUnless { it.isPrecededByNewline() }
680→                ?.let { rbrace ->
681→                    if (hasNewLineInClosedRange(lbrace, rbrace)) {
682→                        requireNewlineBeforeLeaf(
683→                            rbrace,
684→                            autoCorrect,
685→                            emit,
686→                            indentConfig.parentIndentOf(node),
687→                        )
688→                    }
689→                }
690→        }
691→    }

693→    private fun ASTNode.followedByNewline() = nextLeaf().isWhiteSpaceWithNewline()
694→
695→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByNewline() = prevLeaf().isWhiteSpaceWithNewline()
696→
697→    private fun ASTNode.getStartOfBlock() =
698→        firstChildLeafOrSelf()
699→            .let { node ->
700→                if (node.elementType == LBRACE) {
701→                    // WHEN-entry block have LBRACE and RBRACE as first and last elements
702→                    node
703→                } else {
704→                    // Other blocks have LBRACE and RBRACE as siblings of the block
705→                    node.prevLeaf { !it.isPartOfComment() && !it.isWhiteSpace() }
706→                }
707→            }
708→
709→    private fun ASTNode.getEndOfBlock() =
710→        lastChildLeafOrSelf()
711→            .let { node ->
712→                if (node.elementType == RBRACE && treeParent.elementType != FUNCTION_LITERAL) {
713→                    // WHEN-entry block have LBRACE and RBRACE as first and last elements
714→                    node
715→                } else {
716→                    // Other blocks have LBRACE and RBRACE as siblings of the block
717→                    node.nextLeaf { !it.isPartOfComment() && !it.isWhiteSpace() }
718→                }
719→            }

721→    private companion object {
722→        private val LTOKEN_SET = TokenSet.create(LPAR, LBRACE, LBRACKET, LT)
723→        private val RTOKEN_SET = TokenSet.create(RPAR, RBRACE, RBRACKET, GT)
724→        private val MATCHING_RTOKEN_MAP =
725→            LTOKEN_SET.types.zip(
726→                RTOKEN_SET.types,
727→            ).toMap()
728→    }

485→    private fun ASTNode.calculateIndentOfFunctionLiteralParameters() =
486→        if (isFirstParameterOfFunctionLiteralPrecededByNewLine()) {
487→            // val fieldExample =
488→            //      LongNameClass {
489→            //              paramA,
490→            //              paramB,
491→            //              paramC ->
492→            //          ClassB(paramA, paramB, paramC)
493→            //      }
494→            indentConfig.indent.repeat(2)
495→        } else {
496→            // Allow default IntelliJ IDEA formatting:
497→            // val fieldExample =
498→            //     LongNameClass { paramA,
499→            //                     paramB,
500→            //                     paramC ->
501→            //         ClassB(paramA, paramB, paramC)
502→            //     }
503→            // val fieldExample =
504→            //     someFunction(
505→            //         1,
506→            //         2,
507→            //     ) { paramA,
508→            //         paramB,
509→            //         paramC ->
510→            //         ClassB(paramA, paramB, paramC)
511→            //     }
512→            this
513→                .takeIf { it.isPartOf(CALL_EXPRESSION) }
514→                ?.treeParent
515→                ?.leaves(false)
516→                ?.takeWhile { !it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
517→                ?.sumOf { it.textLength }
518→                ?.plus(2) // need to add spaces to compensate for "{ "
519→                ?.let { length -> " ".repeat(length) }
520→                ?: indentConfig.indent.repeat(2)

public class IndentationRule :
    StandardRule(
        id = "indent",
        visitorModifiers =
            setOf(
                VisitorModifier.RunAsLateAsPossible,
                VisitorModifier.RunAfterRule(
                    ruleId = FUNCTION_SIGNATURE_RULE_ID,
                    mode = REGARDLESS_WHETHER_RUN_AFTER_RULE_IS_LOADED_OR_DISABLED,
                ),
                VisitorModifier.RunAfterRule(
                    ruleId = TRAILING_COMMA_ON_CALL_SITE_RULE_ID,
                    mode = REGARDLESS_WHETHER_RUN_AFTER_RULE_IS_LOADED_OR_DISABLED,
                ),
                VisitorModifier.RunAfterRule(
                    ruleId = TRAILING_COMMA_ON_DECLARATION_SITE_RULE_ID,
                    mode = REGARDLESS_WHETHER_RUN_AFTER_RULE_IS_LOADED_OR_DISABLED,
                ),
            ),
        usesEditorConfigProperties =
            setOf(
                CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY,
                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
            ),
    ) {
    private var codeStyle = CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY.defaultValue
    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG

    private var line = 1

    private val indentContextStack: Deque<IndentContext> = LinkedList()

    private lateinit var stringTemplateIndenter: StringTemplateIndenter

    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
        codeStyle = editorConfig[CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY]
        indentConfig =
            IndentConfig(
                indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
                tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
            )
        if (indentConfig.disabled) {
            stopTraversalOfAST()
        }
    }

    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
        node: ASTNode,
        autoCorrect: Boolean,
        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
    ) {
        if (node.isRoot()) {
            // File should not start with a whitespace
            node
                .nextLeaf()
                ?.takeIf { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() }
                ?.let { whitespaceWithoutNewline ->
                    emit(node.startOffset, "Unexpected indentation", true)
                    if (autoCorrect) {
                        whitespaceWithoutNewline.treeParent.removeChild(whitespaceWithoutNewline)
                    }
                }
            indentContextStack.addLast(startNoIndentZone(node))
        }

        when {
            node.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() -> {
                line++
                if (indentContextStack.peekLast()?.activated == false) {
                    val lastIndentContext = indentContextStack.removeLast()
                    indentContextStack.addLast(
                        startNoIndentZone(
                            fromAstNode = lastIndentContext.fromASTNode,
                            toAstNode = lastIndentContext.toASTNode,
                        ),
                    )
                }
            }

            node.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST &&
                node.treeParent.elementType != FUNCTION_LITERAL ->
                visitValueParameterList(node)

            node.elementType == TYPE_PARAMETER_LIST -> visitTypeParameterList(node)

            node.elementType == VALUE_ARGUMENT_LIST ->
                node
                    .treeParent
                    .takeIf { parent -> parent.elementType != FUNCTION_LITERAL }
                    ?.let { visitValueArgumentList(node) }

            node.elementType == ANNOTATION -> visitAnnotation(node)

            node.elementType == CLASS -> visitClass(node)

            node.elementType == WHEN -> visitWhen(node)

            node.elementType == BLOCK ||
                node.elementType == CASE_LABELED_STATEMENT ||
                node.elementType == LITERAL_STRING_TEMPLATE_ENTRY ||
                node.elementType == LONG_STRING_TEMPLATE_ENTRY -> visitBlock(node)

            node.elementType == RBRACE &&
                node.treeParent.elementType == FUNCTION_LITERAL &&
                isFirstParameterOfFunctionLiteralPrecededByNewLine() ->
                endIndentContext(
                    node = node,
                    parentIndent = indentConfig.parentIndentOf(node),
                    emit = emit,
                )

            node.elementType == RBRACE -> endIndentContext(node, emit)

            node.elementType == LBRACE &&
                node.treeParent.elementType == FUNCTION_LITERAL -> visitLbraceInFunctionLiteral(node)

            node.elementType == LPAR -> visitLpar(node, autoCorrect, emit)

            node.elementType == LBRACKET -> visitLbracket(node, autoCorrect, emit)

            node.elementType == LBRACE &&
                node.treeParent.elementType != FUNCTION_LITERAL -> visitLbrace(node, autoCorrect, emit)

            node.elementType == COLON -> visitColon(node)

            node.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER -> visitValueParameter(node)

            node.elementType == PROPERTY &&
                node.treeParent.elementType == CLASS_BODY -> visitProperty(node, emit)

            node.elementType == EQ &&
                node.treeParent.elementType == PROPERTY &&
                node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType == CLASS_BODY ->
                visitEqInProperty(node)

            node.elementType == EQ -> visitEq(node)

            node.elementType == FUN -> visitFunction(node)

            node.elementType == FUN && node.isPartOf(INTERFACE) -> visitFunctionInInterface(node)

            node.elementType == RPAR && node.treeParent.elementType == CONSTRUCTOR_KEYWORD -> visitRpar(node)

            node.elementType == RBRACKET -> visitRbracket(node)

            node.elementType == ARROW -> visitArrow(node)

            node.elementType == RETURN_KEYWORD -> visitReturnKeyword(node)

            node.elementType == CATCH -> visitCatch(node)

            node.elementType == FINALLY -> visitFinally(node)

            node.elementType == ELSE -> visitElse(node)

            node.elementType == WHEN_ENTRY -> visitWhenEntry(node)

            node.elementType == SUPER_TYPE_LIST -> node.takeUnless { node.isCompactSuperTypeList }?.let {
                visitSuperTypeList(it)
            }

            node.elementType == FOR -> visitFor(node)

            node.elementType == WHILE -> visitWhile(node)

            node.elementType == OBJECT_DECLARATION -> visitObjectDeclaration(node)

            node.elementType == SECONDARY_CONSTRUCTOR -> visitSecondaryConstructor(node)

            node.elementType == PRIMARY_CONSTRUCTOR -> visitPrimaryConstructor(node)

            node.elementType == CONSTRUCTOR_KEYWORD && node.treeParent.elementType != CLASS ->
                visitConstructorKeyword(node)
        }
    }

    private fun ASTNode.isCompactSuperTypeList() =
        // Allow
        // class A : B, C
        val entries = (psi as KtSuperTypeList).entries
        entries.all { it.containsNoWhitespace() }

    private fun visitValueParameterList(node: ASTNode) {
        startIndentContext(
            fromAstNode = node,
            toAstNode = node,
            firstChildIndent = "",
            lastChildIndent = "",
        )
    }

    private fun visitLbraceInFunctionLiteral(node: ASTNode) {
        val rbrace = node.treeParent.findChildByType(RBRACE) ?: return
        node.treeParent.children().takeIf { it.isNotEmpty() }?.let { children ->
            val lbrace = node
            // Indent context for parameters and body
            startIndentContext(
                fromAstNode = node,
                toAstNode = rbrace,
                firstChildIndent = "",
                lastChildIndent = "",
            )

            // Inner indent context in reversed order
            node
                .treeParent
                ?.takeIf { it.elementType == FUNCTION_LITERAL }
                ?.findChildByType(ARROW)
                ?.let { arrow ->
                    startIndentContext(
                        fromAstNode = arrow,
                        toAstNode = rbrace,
                        lastChildIndent = "",
                    )
                    startIndentContext(
                        fromAstNode = node,
                        toAstNode = arrow.prevCodeLeaf()!!,
                        childIndent = arrow.calculateIndentOfFunctionLiteralParameters(),
                    )
                }
        }
    }

    private fun ASTNode.calculateIndentOfFunctionLiteralParameters() =
        if (isFirstParameterOfFunctionLiteralPrecededByNewLine()) {
            // val fieldExample =
            //      LongNameClass {
            //              paramA,
            //              paramB,
            //              paramC ->
            //          ClassB(paramA, paramB, paramC)
            //      }
            indentConfig.indent.repeat(2)
        } else {
            // Allow default IntelliJ IDEA formatting:
            // val fieldExample =
            //     LongNameClass { paramA,
            //                     paramB,
            //                     paramC ->
            //         ClassB(paramA, paramB, paramC)
            //     }
            // val fieldExample =
            //     someFunction(
            //         1,
            //         2,
            //     ) { paramA,
            //         paramB,
            //         paramC ->
            //         ClassB(paramA, paramB, paramC)
            //     }
            this
                .takeIf { it.isPartOf(CALL_EXPRESSION) }
                ?.treeParent
                ?.leaves(false)
                ?.takeWhile { !it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
                ?.sumOf { it.textLength }
                ?.plus(2) // need to add spaces to compensate for "{ "
                ?.let { length -> " ".repeat(length) }
                ?: indentConfig.indent.repeat(2)
        }

    private fun ASTNode.isFirstParameterOfFunctionLiteralPrecededByNewLine() =
        parent(FUNCTION_LITERAL)
            ?.findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST)
            ?.treeParent
            ?.findChildByType(LBRACE)
            ?.let { lbrace ->
                // Check if there's a newline between the opening brace and the first parameter
                // This indicates that the parameters are actually on multiple lines
                val parameterList = parent(FUNCTION_LITERAL)!!.findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST)!!
                val spacesBetweenLbraceAndParamList = lbrace.nextSibling { it == parameterList }
                
                // If there are tokens between LBRACE and VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST, check if any contains a newline
                spacesBetweenLbraceAndParamList?.any { it.textContains('\n') } == true
            } == true

    private fun visitLparBeforeCondition(node: ASTNode) {
        startIndentContext(
            fromAstNode = requireNotNull(node.nextLeaf()), // Allow to pickup whitespace before condition
            toAstNode = requireNotNull(node.nextCodeSibling()).lastChildLeafOrSelf(), // Ignore whitespace after condition but before rpar
            nodeIndent = currentIndent() + indentConfig.indent,
            childIndent = "",
        )
    }

    // ... rest of the file continues ..."}

 129→public class IndentationRule :
 130→    StandardRule(
 131→        id = "indent",
 132→        visitorModifiers =
 133→            setOf(
 134→                VisitorModifier.RunAsLateAsPossible,
 135→                VisitorModifier.RunAfterRule(
 136→                    ruleId = FUNCTION_SIGNATURE_RULE_ID,
 137→                    mode = REGARDLESS_WHETHER_RUN_AFTER_RULE_IS_LOADED_OR_DISABLED,
 138→                ),
 139→                VisitorModifier.RunAfterRule(
 140→                    ruleId = TRAILING_COMMA_ON_CALL_SITE_RULE_ID,
 141→                    mode = REGARDLESS_WHETHER_RUN_AFTER_RULE_IS_LOADED_OR_DISABLED,
 142→                ),
 143→                VisitorModifier.RunAfterRule(
 144→                    ruleId = TRAILING_COMMA_ON_DECLARATION_SITE_RULE_ID,
 145→                    mode = REGARDLESS_WHETHER_RUN_AFTER_RULE_IS_LOADED_OR_DISABLED,
 146→                ),
 147→            ),
 148→        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 149→            setOf(
 150→                CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 151→                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 152→                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 153→            ),
 154→    ) {
 155→    private var codeStyle = CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY.defaultValue
 156→    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 157→
 158→    private var line = 1
 159→
 160→    private val indentContextStack: Deque<IndentContext> = LinkedList()
 161→
 162→    private lateinit var stringTemplateIndenter: StringTemplateIndenter
 163→
 164→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 165→        codeStyle = editorConfig[CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY]
 166→        indentConfig =
 167→            IndentConfig(
 168→                indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
 169→                tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
 170→            )
 171→        if (indentConfig.disabled) {
 172→            stopTraversalOfAST()
 173→        }
 174→    }
 175→
 176→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 177→        node: ASTNode,
 178→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 179→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 180→    ) {
 181→        if (node.isRoot()) {
 182→            // File should not start with a whitespace
 183→            node
 184→                .nextLeaf()
 185→                ?.takeIf { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() }
 186→                ?.let { whitespaceWithoutNewline ->
 187→                    emit(node.startOffset, "Unexpected indentation", true)
 188→                    if (autoCorrect) {
 189→                        whitespaceWithoutNewline.treeParent.removeChild(whitespaceWithoutNewline)
 190→                    }
 191→                }
 192→            indentContextStack.addLast(startNoIndentZone(node))
 193→        }
 194→
 195→        when {
 196→            node.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() -> {
 197→                line++
 198→                if (indentContextStack.peekLast()?.activated == false) {
 199→                    val lastIndentContext = indentContextStack.removeLast()
 200→                    indentContextStack.addLast(
 201→                        lastIndentContext.copy(activated = true),
 202→                    )
 203→                }
 204→                visitNewLineIndentation(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 205→            }
 206→
 207→            node.elementType == CLASS_BODY ||
 208→                node.elementType == CONTEXT_RECEIVER_LIST ||
 209→                node.elementType == LONG_STRING_TEMPLATE_ENTRY ||
 210→                node.elementType == STRING_TEMPLATE ||
 211→                node.elementType == VALUE_ARGUMENT_LIST ->
 212→                startIndentContext(
 213→                    fromAstNode = node,
 214→                    lastChildIndent = "",
 215→                )
 216→
 217→            node.elementType == SUPER_TYPE_CALL_ENTRY -> {
 218→                if (codeStyle == ktlint_official && node.isPartOfClassWithAMultilinePrimaryConstructor()) {
 219→                    // Contrary to the default IntelliJ IDEA formatter, indent the super type call entry so that it looks better in case it
 220→                    // is followed by another super type:
 221→                    //      class Foo(
 222→                    //          val bar1: Bar,
 223→                    //          val bar2: Bar,
 224→                    //      ) : FooBar(
 225→                    //              bar1,
 226→                    //              bar2
 227→                    //          ),
 228→                    //          BarFoo,
 229→                    startIndentContext(
 230→                        fromAstNode = node,
 231→                        childIndent = indentConfig.indent,
 232→                        activated = true,
 233→                    )
 234→                } else {
 235→                    startIndentContext(
 236→                        fromAstNode = node,
 237→                        lastChildIndent = "",
 238→                    )
 239→                }
 240→            }
 241→
 242→            node.elementType == VALUE_ARGUMENT ->
 243→                visitValueArgument(node)
 244→
 245→            node.elementType == SECONDARY_CONSTRUCTOR ->
 246→                visitSecondaryConstructor(node)
 247→
 248→            node.elementType == PARENTHESIZED &&
 249→                node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != IF ->
 250→                startIndentContext(node)
 251→
 252→            node.elementType == BINARY_WITH_TYPE ||
 253→                node.elementType == SUPER_TYPE_ENTRY ||
 254→                node.elementType == TYPE_ARGUMENT_LIST ||
 255→                node.elementType == TYPE_PARAMETER_LIST ||
 256→                node.elementType == USER_TYPE ->
 257→                startIndentContext(node)
 258→
 259→            node.elementType == DELEGATED_SUPER_TYPE_ENTRY ||
 260→                node.elementType == ANNOTATED_EXPRESSION ||
 261→                node.elementType == TYPE_REFERENCE ->
 262→                startIndentContext(
 263→                    fromAstNode = node,
 264→                    childIndent = "",
 265→                )
 266→
 267→            node.elementType == IF ->
 268→                visitIf(node)
 269→
 270→            node.elementType == LBRACE ->
 271→                visitLbrace(node)
 272→
 273→            node.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST &&
 274→                node.treeParent.elementType != FUNCTION_LITERAL ->
 275→                startIndentContext(
 276→                    fromAstNode = node,
 277→                    lastChildIndent = "",
 278→                )
 279→
 280→            node.elementType == LPAR &&
 281→                node.nextCodeSibling()?.elementType == CONDITION ->
 282→                visitLparBeforeCondition(node)
 283→
 284→            node.elementType == VALUE_PARAMETER ->
 285→                visitValueParameter(node)
 286→
 287→            node.elementType == FUN ->
 288→                visitFun(node)
 289→
 290→            node.elementType == CLASS ->
 291→                visitClass(node)
 292→
 293→            node.elementType == OBJECT_DECLARATION ->
 294→                visitObjectDeclaration(node)
 295→
 296→            node.elementType == BINARY_EXPRESSION ->
 297→                visitBinaryExpression(node)
 298→
 299→            node.elementType in CHAINABLE_EXPRESSION -> {
 300→                if (codeStyle == ktlint_official &&
 301→                    node.elementType == DOT_QUALIFIED_EXPRESSION &&
 302→                    node.treeParent?.elementType == ARRAY_ACCESS_EXPRESSION &&
 303→                    node.treeParent?.treeParent?.elementType == CALL_EXPRESSION
 304→                ) {
 305→                    // Issue 1540: Deviate and fix from incorrect formatting in IntelliJ IDEA formatting and produce following:
 306→                    // val fooBar2 = foo
 307→                    //    .bar[0] {
 308→                    //        "foobar"
 309→                    //    }
 310→                    startIndentContext(
 311→                        fromAstNode = node.treeParent,
 312→                        toAstNode = node.treeParent.treeParent.lastChildLeafOrSelf(),
 313→                    )
 314→                } else if (node.prevCodeSibling().isElvisOperator()) {
 315→                    startIndentContext(node)
 316→                } else if (node.treeParent.elementType in CHAINABLE_EXPRESSION) {
 317→                    // Multiple dot qualified expressions and/or safe expression on the same line should not increase the indent level
 318→                } else {
 319→                    startIndentContext(node)
 320→                }
 321→            }
 322→
 323→            node.elementType == IDENTIFIER &&
 324→                node.treeParent.elementType == PROPERTY ->
 325→                visitIdentifierInProperty(node)
 326→
 327→            node.elementType == LITERAL_STRING_TEMPLATE_ENTRY &&
 328→                node.nextCodeSibling()?.elementType == CLOSING_QUOTE ->
 329→                visitWhiteSpaceBeforeClosingQuote(node, autoCorrect, emit)
 330→
 331→            node.elementType == WHEN ->
 332→                visitWhen(node)
 333→
 334→            node.elementType == WHEN_ENTRY ->
 335→                visitWhenEntry(node)
 336→
 337→            node.elementType == WHERE_KEYWORD &&
 338→                node.nextCodeSibling()?.elementType == TYPE_CONSTRAINT_LIST ->
 339→                visitWhereKeywordBeforeTypeConstraintList(node)
 340→
 341→            node.elementType == KDOC ->
 342→                visitKdoc(node)
 343→
 344→            node.elementType == PROPERTY_ACCESSOR ||
 345→                node.elementType == TYPEALIAS ->
 346→                visitPropertyAccessor(node)
 347→
 348→            node.elementType == FOR ||
 349→                node.elementType == WHILE ->
 350→                visitConditionalLoop(node)
 351→
 352→            node.elementType == LBRACKET ->
 353→                visitLBracket(node)
 354→
 355→            node.elementType == NULLABLE_TYPE ->
 356→                visitNullableType(node)
 357→
 358→            node.elementType == DESTRUCTURING_DECLARATION ->
 359→                visitDestructuringDeclaration(node)
 360→
 361→            node.elementType == TRY ->
 362→                visitTryCatchFinally(node)
 363→
 364→            else -> {
 365→                LOGGER.trace { "No processing for ${node.elementType}: ${node.textWithEscapedTabAndNewline()}" }
 366→            }
 367→        }
 368→    }

 370→    private fun ASTNode.isPartOfClassWithAMultilinePrimaryConstructor() =
 371→        parent { it.elementType == CLASS }
 372→            ?.findChildByType(PRIMARY_CONSTRUCTOR)
 373→            ?.textContains('\n') == true
 374→
 375→    private fun visitValueArgument(node: ASTNode) {
 376→        if (codeStyle == ktlint_official) {
 377→            // Deviate from standard IntelliJ IDEA formatting to allow formatting below:
 378→            //     val foo = foo(
 379→            //         parameterName =
 380→            //             "The quick brown fox "
 381→            //                .plus("jumps ")
 382→            //                .plus("over the lazy dog"),
 383→            //     )
 384→            startIndentContext(
 385→                fromAstNode = node,
 386→                lastChildIndent = "",
 387→            )
 388→        }
 389→    }
 390→
 391→    private fun visitSecondaryConstructor(node: ASTNode) {
 392→        node
 393→            .findChildByType(CONSTRUCTOR_DELEGATION_CALL)
 394→            ?.let { constructorDelegationCall ->
 395→                val fromAstNode = node.skipLeadingWhitespaceCommentsAndAnnotations()
 396→                val nextToAstNode =
 397→                    startIndentContext(
 398→                        fromAstNode = constructorDelegationCall,
 399→                    ).prevCodeLeaf()
 400→
 401→                // Leading annotations and comments should be indented at same level as constructor itself
 402→                if (fromAstNode != node.nextLeaf()) {
 403→                    startIndentContext(
 404→                        fromAstNode = node,
 405→                        toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 406→                        childIndent = "",
 407→                    )
 408→                }
 409→            }
 410→    }
 411→
 412→    private fun visitIf(node: ASTNode) {
 413→        var nextToAstNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 414→        node
 415→            .findChildByType(ELSE)
 416→            ?.let { fromAstNode ->
 417→                nextToAstNode =
 418→                    startIndentContext(
 419→                        fromAstNode = fromAstNode,
 420→                        toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 421→                    ).prevCodeLeaf()
 422→            }
 423→
 424→        node
 425→            .findChildByType(THEN)
 426→            ?.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 427→            ?.nextLeaf()
 428→            ?.let { nodeAfterThenBlock ->
 429→                nextToAstNode =
 430→                    startIndentContext(
 431→                        fromAstNode = nodeAfterThenBlock,
 432→                        toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 433→                        childIndent = "",
 434→                    ).prevCodeLeaf()
 435→            }
 436→        node
 437→            .findChildByType(RPAR)
 438→            ?.nextCodeLeaf()
 439→            ?.let { nodeAfterConditionBlock ->
 440→                nextToAstNode =
 441→                    startIndentContext(
 442→                        fromAstNode = nodeAfterConditionBlock,
 443→                        toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 444→                    ).prevCodeLeaf()
 445→            }
 446→        startIndentContext(
 447→            fromAstNode = node,
 448→            toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 449→            lastChildIndent = "", // No indent for the RPAR
 450→        )
 451→    }
 452→
 453→    private fun visitLbrace(node: ASTNode) {
 454→        // Outer indent context
 455→        val rbrace =
 456→            requireNotNull(
 457→                node.nextSibling { it.elementType == RBRACE },
 458→            ) { "Can not find matching rbrace" }
 459→        startIndentContext(
 460→            fromAstNode = node,
 461→            toAstNode = rbrace,
 462→            firstChildIndent = "",
 463→            lastChildIndent = "",
 464→        )
 465→
 466→        // Inner indent context in reversed order
 467→        node
 468→            .treeParent
 469→            ?.takeIf { it.elementType == FUNCTION_LITERAL }
 470→            ?.findChildByType(ARROW)
 471→            ?.let { arrow ->
 472→                startIndentContext(
 473→                    fromAstNode = arrow,
 474→                    toAstNode = rbrace,
 475→                    lastChildIndent = "",
 476→                )
 477→                startIndentContext(
 478→                    fromAstNode = node,
 479→                    toAstNode = arrow.prevCodeLeaf()!!,
 480→                    childIndent = arrow.calculateIndentOfFunctionLiteralParameters(),
 481→                )
 482→            }
 483→    }
 484→
 485→    private fun ASTNode.calculateIndentOfFunctionLiteralParameters() =
 486→        if (isFirstParameterOfFunctionLiteralPrecededByNewLine()) {
 487→            // val fieldExample =
 488→            //      LongNameClass {
 489→            //              paramA,
 490→            //              paramB,
 491→            //              paramC ->
 492→            //          ClassB(paramA, paramB, paramC)
 493→            //      }
 494→            indentConfig.indent.repeat(2)
 495→        } else {
 496→            // Allow default IntelliJ IDEA formatting:
 497→            // val fieldExample =
 498→            //     LongNameClass { paramA,
 499→            //                     paramB,
 500→            //                     paramC ->
 501→            //         ClassB(paramA, paramB, paramC)
 502→            //     }
 503→            // val fieldExample =
 504→            //     someFunction(
 505→            //         1,
 506→            //         2,
 507→            //     ) { paramA,
 508→            //         paramB,
 509→            //         paramC ->
 510→            //         ClassB(paramA, paramB, paramC)
 511→            //     }
 512→            this
 513→                .takeIf { it.isPartOf(CALL_EXPRESSION) }
 514→                ?.treeParent
 515→                ?.leaves(false)
 516→                ?.takeWhile { !it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
 517→                ?.sumOf { it.textLength }
 518→                ?.plus(2) // need to add spaces to compensate for "{ "
 519→                ?.let { length -> " ".repeat(length) }
 520→                ?: indentConfig.indent.repeat(2)
 521→        }
 522→
 523→    private fun ASTNode.isFirstParameterOfFunctionLiteralPrecededByNewLine() =
 524→        parent(FUNCTION_LITERAL)
 525→            ?.findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER_LIST)
 526→            ?.prevSibling { it.textContains('\n') } != null

 528→    private fun visitLparBeforeCondition(node: ASTNode) {
 529→        startIndentContext(
 530→            fromAstNode = requireNotNull(node.nextLeaf()), // Allow to pickup whitespace before condition
 531→            toAstNode = requireNotNull(node.nextCodeSibling()).lastChildLeafOrSelf(), // Ignore whitespace after condition but before rpar
 532→            nodeIndent = currentIndent() + indentConfig.indent,
 533→            childIndent = "",
 534→        )
 535→    }
 536→
 537→    private fun visitValueParameter(node: ASTNode) {
 538→        // Inner indent contexts in reversed order
 539→        var nextToAstNode: ASTNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 540→        node
 541→            .findChildByType(EQ)
 542→            ?.let { fromAstNode ->
 543→                nextToAstNode =
 544→                    startIndentContext(
 545→                        fromAstNode = fromAstNode,
 546→                        toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 547→                    ).prevCodeLeaf()
 548→            }
 549→
 550→        if (codeStyle == ktlint_official) {
 551→            // Deviate from standard IntelliJ IDEA formatting to allow formatting below:
 552→            //     fun process(
 553→            //         aVariableWithAVeryLongName:
 554→            //             TypeWithAVeryLongNameThatDoesNotFitOnSameLineAsTheVariableName
 555→            //     ): List<Output>
 556→            node
 557→                .findChildByType(COLON)
 558→                ?.let { fromAstNode ->
 559→                    nextToAstNode =
 560→                        startIndentContext(
 561→                            fromAstNode = fromAstNode,
 562→                            toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 563→                        ).prevCodeLeaf()
 564→                }
 565→        }
 566→
 567→        // Leading annotations and comments should be indented at same level as constructor itself
 568→        val fromAstNode = node.skipLeadingWhitespaceCommentsAndAnnotations()
 569→        if (fromAstNode != node.firstChildNode &&
 570→            node.prevSibling { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() } == null &&
 571→            node == node.treeParent.findChildByType(VALUE_PARAMETER)
 572→        ) {
 573→            nextToAstNode = startIndentContext(
 574→                fromAstNode = fromAstNode,
 575→                toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 576→            ).fromASTNode.prevLeaf { !it.isWhiteSpace() }!!
 577→        } else {
 578→            startIndentContext(
 579→                fromAstNode = node,
 580→                toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 581→                childIndent = "",
 582→            )
 583→        }
 584→    }
 585→
 586→    private fun visitFun(node: ASTNode) {
 587→        // Inner indent contexts in reversed order
 588→        var nextToAstNode: ASTNode = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf()
 589→        val eqOrBlock =
 590→            node.findChildByType(EQ)
 591→                ?: node.findChildByType(BLOCK)
 592→        eqOrBlock?.let {
 593→            nextToAstNode =
 594→                startIndentContext(
 595→                    fromAstNode = eqOrBlock,
 596→                    toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 597→                ).prevCodeLeaf()
 598→        }
 599→
 600→        node
 601→            .findChildByType(TYPE_REFERENCE)
 602→            ?.let { typeReference ->
 603→                nextToAstNode =
 604→                    startIndentContext(
 605→                        fromAstNode = typeReference.getPrecedingLeadingCommentsAndWhitespaces(),
 606→                        toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 607→                    ).prevCodeLeaf()
 608→            }
 609→
 610→        // Leading annotations and comments should be indented at same level as function itself
 611→        startIndentContext(
 612→            fromAstNode = node,
 613→            toAstNode = nextToAstNode,
 614→            childIndent = "",
 615→        )
 616→    }
